programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Best Of - Unique Weapons & Rick's Armor
programme.desc: When a seller brings in an antique key gun, will the mystery behind it be revealed?

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Officers attend to a car crash with a heavily pregnant victim. Then, police catch two speedsters simultaneously and the cars they're driving have to be seen to be believed.

programme.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
programme.desc: A meth-running stripper leads police on a wild pursuit; an interrogator tries to match wits with a suspected murderer; a criminally insane cop-killer forces a gun-fueled showdown in a trailer park.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: In a tribute to the godfather of the pain index, Dr. Justin Schmidt, Adam and Rob tangle with a new batch of extremely painful and deadly insects.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: The Princess Charlotte Bay trip continues with our winner, John Cates. John has only a few more fish to catch to take home the $5000 worth of gear from Daiwa.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Come fishing with Merv Hughes on some great fishing adventures. It's a lighthearted fishing show with some ripping catches.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: Scott and Kim are off on an epic road trip following the waterways of western Queensland.

programme.title: Caught On Dashcam
programme.desc: Buckle up! It's time for a brand-new sixth series of Caught on Dashcam. The show that brings you the thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.sub-title: I'm Dreaming of a Redneck Christmas
programme.desc: The Robertsons get ready for the Christmas Holidays, with Miss Kay cooking up a special dish, Willie playing Santa, and the rest of the gang putting up the Christmas lights.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 travel the world to prove that blokes are the same all over, and they all share the same passions.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and the crew work to restore a miniature Model T when a customer picks it out of the boneyard, and later, a firefighter brings in a vintage 1930s forest field service phone for transformation.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's all in the family in Moreno Valley, as Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Mary's fraternization with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Once a roadie for a long list of fabled performers, Travis' home is like a rock 'n' roll scrapbook. Later, in Louisiana, the guys get seriously fired up at the Bonnie & Clyde Ambush Museum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Best Of - Unique Weapons & Rick's Armor
programme.desc: When a seller brings in an antique key gun, will the mystery behind it be revealed?

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Officers are on the end of a drunk man's anger, and police are left to deal with a tempestuous two-year-old who is refusing to obey the law.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Officers attend to a car crash with a heavily pregnant victim. Then, police catch two speedsters simultaneously and the cars they're driving have to be seen to be believed.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A man pulls out a gun at a children's birthday party and a suspected drug house is searched, tonight on THE FORCE: BEHIND THE LINE. Hosted by SIMON REEVE.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A gunman causes fear in a peaceful suburban street, Tuesday night revellers don't want their party to end and a routine car search could get nasty when a machete appears.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the bitter cold pushes predators to the edge, Tom is caught in a close range battle while Rich goes head to head with a pack of wolves.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A client has high expectations of Rick when he agrees to a $10,000 restoration of his 1950s soda fountain. A repeat customer challenges the guys to revive his vintage phone booth.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies show up in 'Bourgie Brea' and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are freestyling in Louisiana when Frank spots an alien spaceship emerging from an Airstream trailer. Later, Mike's honest approach wins over a tough-as-nails negotiator.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rev your engines with the team when a legendary 1967 Shelby GT350 speeds into the shop.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Magpies go head-to-head with the Hawks, live and free from the MCG. Bounce time: 7:30 pm AEST.

programme.title: AFL Post Game
programme.desc: A look back at all the action from tonight's game.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake Pentecost, son of Stacker Pentecost, reunites with Mako Mori to lead a new generation of Jaeger pilots, including rival Lambert and 15-year-old hacker Amara, against a new Kaiju threat.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Santa Ana, Brandi fights for a win, Rene spots a locker that calls to him, Kenny puts out his wishes, and Barry battles to stay in the game.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are freestyling in Louisiana when Frank spots an alien spaceship emerging from an Airstream trailer. Later, Mike's honest approach wins over a tough-as-nails negotiator.

programme.title: The Front Bar
programme.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: Thinking he's getting his revenge on Rob for selecting tarantulas earlier this season, Adam programs Rob's phobia: centipedes. An American centipede produces one of their most painful bites ever.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: The team head to Albany Island with Shane Hendrick from Melbourne. They explore the east coast of Cape York, chasing everything from Spaniards to Barramundi in this spectacular wilderness.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Come fishing with Merv Hughes on some great fishing adventures. It's a lighthearted fishing show with some ripping catches.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: Join Scott and Olivia on an epic caravanning adventure with Stoney Creek Campers. The crew are making their way from the seaside to the scrub to find the most stellar spots in northern New South Wales.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the bitter cold pushes predators to the edge, Tom is caught in a close range battle while Rich goes head to head with a pack of wolves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realises that he could lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the warehouse guy's new office pet escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too \.

programme.title: Adelaide Motorsport Festival Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Adelaide Motorsport Festival.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A client has high expectations of Rick when he agrees to a $10,000 restoration of his 1950s soda fountain. A repeat customer challenges the guys to revive his vintage phone booth.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies show up in 'Bourgie Brea' and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are freestyling in Louisiana when Frank spots an alien spaceship emerging from an Airstream trailer. Later, Mike's honest approach wins over a tough-as-nails negotiator.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rev your engines with the team when a legendary 1967 Shelby GT350 speeds into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Go to DEFCON 1 with the team when a seller claims he has a cover for a thermonuclear warhead.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports Series
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top Timbersports athletes as they compete for the 2024 STIHL Timbersports Australian Championship and their chance to represent Australia at the World Championships in France.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: A visit from Tom's son Chad goes terribly wrong and Marty's flight back from the Revelation Mountains is delayed.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick suits up to restore a basketball arcade game from the 1950s, but problems with its electronics force him to enter into a unique business agreement.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, California, Ivy takes it easy and lets Ivy Jr. run the operation. Kenny feels run-down and his lack of focus lands him a locker, though there's a pleasant surprise in the end.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are winging it in Texas when the automotive gods come through with two once-in-a-lifetime picking opportunities.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A pair of vintage Aerosmith tour shirts jam into the shop.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Bulldogs clash with the Dockers, live and free from Marvel Stadium. Bounce time: 7:30 pm AEST.

programme.title: AFL Post Game
programme.desc: A look back at all the action from tonight's game.

programme.title: Get On Extra
programme.desc: Each week join Lizzie Jelfs, Matt Hill, Simon Marshall and Brent Zerafa as they dive headlong into the all the weekend's best racing to find you their best bets.

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: While vacationing, a girl and her parents are taken hostage by armed strangers who demand that the family make a choice to avert the apocalypse.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the warehouse guy's new office pet escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too \.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: A visit from Tom's son Chad goes terribly wrong and Marty's flight back from the Revelation Mountains is delayed.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are winging it in Texas when the automotive gods come through with two once-in-a-lifetime picking opportunities.
